response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no evidence of C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking or security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain complex systems including embedded-like projects (e.g., DLang, real-time systems)
Active contributor to open-source tools and technical education through workshops and talks
concerns: No proven experience in C for embedded Linux or kernel-level development
No exposure to required security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal) or switch firmware
Japanese language proficiency is absent, despite being a mandatory requirement
